ThingDef.label: Wolfein Homemade Pistol
ThingDef.description: A crude, single-shot improvised firearm with rudimentary construction. Though vastly inferior to manufactured weapons, its compact design and ease of concealment make it a desperation-sidearm for close-quarter emergencies.

ThingDef.label: Wolfein Heavy Pistol
ThingDef.description: A rarely encountered high-caliber sidearm manufactured by MegaCorp, delivering exceptional firepower at the cost of poor ergonomics and punishing recoil.

ThingDef.label: Wolfein Machine Pistol
ThingDef.description: A compact machine pistol optimized for close-quarters engagements, offering full-auto firepower with greater portability than standard submachine guns.

ThingDef.label: Wolfein Pistol
ThingDef.description: A sleek, user-friendly pistol commonly issued to Wolfein corporate security and law enforcement personnel, prioritizing reliability in high-stress scenarios.

ThingDef.label: Wolfein Rebel Pistol
ThingDef.description: The standard-issue compact semi-automatic sidearm for Wolfein ResistanceArmy, providing reliable rapid-response capability in close-quarters engagements.

ThingDef.label: Wolfein Charge Rapid-Fire Pistol
ThingDef.description: MegaCorp-issued sidearm for armed forces, integrating charge-cell technology to unleash rapid bursts of high-pulse energy projectiles with armor-shredding capability.

ThingDef.label: Wolfein Light Submachine Gun
ThingDef.description: While falling short in range and stopping power compared to standard arms, its compact frame and blistering fire rate make it ideal for close-quarters urban engagements.

ThingDef.label: Wolfein Rebel Submachine Gun
ThingDef.description: The standard urban guerrilla warfare equipment for Wolfein ResistanceArmy, featuring a short barrel and collapsible stock design to achieve high-rate suppressive fire and rapid tactical repositioning in confined spaces.

ThingDef.label: Wolfein Charge Submachine Gun
ThingDef.description: A compact submachine gun incorporating charge-cell technology, designed for confined spaces with enhanced close-quarters burst potential through rapid energy projectile saturation.

ThingDef.label: Wolfein Homemade Rifle
ThingDef.description: A rough-hewn weapon crafted from scrap materials, retaining core firing functionality though its crude manufacturing process compromises accuracy and effective range compared to industrial-grade rifles.

ThingDef.label: Wolfein Military Carbine Gun
ThingDef.description: A versatile combat solution for wilderness operations and urban warfare, delivering balanced ballistic profile with enhanced barrel harmonics for mid-range precision and controlled stopping power.

ThingDef.label: Wolfein Military Assault Rifle
ThingDef.description: A multi-role combat system engineered for diverse tactical environments, achieving optimal balance between effective range, shot grouping consistency, and cyclic rate, complemented by high-capacity magazine options.

ThingDef.label: Wolfein Rebel Assault Rifle
ThingDef.description: The primary standard-issue weapon of the Wolfein Resistance, featuring a modular composite construction and an adaptive gas system, ensuring stability in all-terrain combat and compatibility with multiple types of ammunition.

ThingDef.label: Wolfein Charge Assault Rifle
ThingDef.description: Utilizes charge-cell technology, equipped with a precision targeting system and stable firing performance, commonly deployed by MegaCorp tactical task forces.

ThingDef.label: Wolfein Charge Combat Rifle
ThingDef.description: This weapon utilizes charge-cell ammunition to deliver superior firepower and extended range compared to standard assault rifles, but trades these advantages for significant recoil and reduced magazine capacity.

ThingDef.label: Wolfein AIPT Stun Rifle
ThingDef.description: A MegaCorp experimental weapon that uses electromagnetic force between rails to accelerate projectiles to incredible speeds, designed to destroy anomalous objects. The specially designed projectiles are capable of causing temporary disorientation to the target upon impact.

ThingDef.label: Wolfein Homemade Bolt-action Rifle
ThingDef.description: A primitive-looking firearm constructed from scavenged materials. Its rudimentary sights maintain basic accuracy, with a stock wrapped in coarse leather.

ThingDef.label: Wolfein Sniper Rifle
ThingDef.description: A weapon specifically engineered by MegaCorp for long-range precision engagements, featuring exceptional accuracy and extended effective range for surgical target elimination.

ThingDef.label: Wolfein Charge Sniper Rifle
ThingDef.description: A sniper rifle enhanced with charge-round technology, offering exceptional penetration and precision, effectively engaging heavily armored targets at long range.

ThingDef.label: Wolfein Rebel Sniper Rifle
ThingDef.description: The core long-range precision strike equipment of the Wolfein Resistance, specifically designed for behind-enemy-lines infiltration and high-value target elimination missions.

ThingDef.label: Wolfein Minigun
ThingDef.description: A high-capacity, rapid-fire support weapon with formidable firepower offset by its cumbersome weight, typically deployed by Wolfein heavy weapons teams to deliver sustained suppressive fire.

ThingDef.label: Wolfein Rebel Light MachineGun
ThingDef.description: The backbone weapon for squad fire support in the Wolfein Resistance, featuring an open-belt feed system and a quick-change barrel design to meet the dual tactical needs of mobile assault and static defense.

ThingDef.label: Wolfein Charge Minigun
ThingDef.description: A rapid-fire rotary weapon utilizing charge-cell ammunition to unleash devastating suppressive fire against massed enemies, though requiring extended spin-up and cooldown cycles.

ThingDef.label: Wolfein Long Barreled Shotgun
ThingDef.description: A hunting-oriented scattergun with extended barrel length for tighter pellet spread and increased stopping power, optimized for medium-range engagements.

ThingDef.label: Wolfein Automatic Shotgun
ThingDef.description: Excels in close-quarters combat with rapid shell ejection capability, delivering wide-area devastation through high-volume buckshot saturation.

ThingDef.label: Wolfein Automatic Shotgun
ThingDef.description: An automatic shotgun utilizing charge-round technology, effective against heavily armored targets and ideal for close-quarters suppression combat.

ThingDef.label: Wolfein Rebel Shotgun
ThingDef.description: A specialized breaching weapon for close-quarters combat in the Wolfein Resistance, featuring a compact pump-action mechanism and a jam-resistant rifled barrel design.

ThingDef.label: Wolfein Grenade Launcher
ThingDef.description: A portable weapon used by the Wolfein to launch explosive projectiles, offering convenient mobility and formidable blast power, making it the preferred choice for engaging medium-range group targets.

ThingDef.label: Wolfein Taser Gun
ThingDef.description: A non-lethal weapon utilizing high-voltage electroshock technology to swiftly incapacitate targets, serving as essential equipment for Wolfein security personnel.

ThingDef.label: Wolfein Taser Gun Bullet
ThingDef.description: Wolfein Taser Gun Bullet.

ThingDef.label: Wolfein Longbow
ThingDef.description: Crafted from meticulously selected wood and imbued with artisan craftsmanship, this traditional weapon pales in effectiveness compared to modern firearms.

ThingDef.Name: W_Weapon_MissileLauncher
ThingDef.label: Wolfein Missile Launcher
ThingDef.description: An anti-vehicle rocket launcher capable of tearing through the heavy armor of the Machina. Due to its relatively high cost, its deployment across units remains limited.

ThingDef.label: Wolfein Rebel Missile Launcher
ThingDef.description: A makeshift anti-vehicle rocket launcher used by the Resistance. While it lacks the precision and reliability of MegaCorp models, its low cost and simple design make it a genuine threat to armored units.
